title: selaginella bifida
intro: Selaginella bifida, also known as the forked spikemoss, is a species of evergreen perennial plant in the family Selaginellaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella bifida include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory and cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
